top_posts.author: Pmoga Mena Hub
top_posts.title: PMOGA MENA Hub's Post - LinkedIn
top_posts.preview: At the PMOGA MENA Hub, we know that being a PMO leader is about supporting the people behind the projects. In collaboration with PMOGA
top_posts.draft_comment: PMO leaders carrying project pressure AND emotional labor is the real burnout risk. In hospital transformation programs, the ones who broke down weren't managing the hardest portfolios, they were the ones who normalized ignoring their own stress signals. What's the single most impactful thing a PMO leader can do in the first week of sensing chronic team stress?

top_posts.author: Pro Partner Group
top_posts.title: #eidmubarak #gcc #businesssupport #middleeast | Sovereign PPG
top_posts.preview: Artificial Intelligence · Employee Experience · Workplace Trends ... Business Strategy · Change Management · Organizational Culture · Design
top_posts.draft_comment: Eid greetings are table stakes across the GCC. What actually differentiates firms is their day-one post-holiday communication. In my experience working with government and enterprise clients across UAE and Saudi, the organizations that built lasting trust sent a clear 'here's where we left off' message on Eid morning, not just a card. Is your post-holiday cadence deliberate or accidental?

top_posts.author: Alead
top_posts.title: We are excited to invite AWS Partners to AWS PartnerEquip: Live
top_posts.preview: We are excited to invite AWS Partners to AWS PartnerEquip: Live - Dubai, 24 - 26 March 2026. This exclusive three-day event is specifically
top_posts.draft_comment: AWS events in MENA are a dime a dozen, but the ones worth attending focus on architecture decisions, not marketing decks. The real ROI for specialization partners is rarely in the main stage sessions. What percentage of this three-day agenda is deep-dive technical vs. keynote-style content?

top_posts.author: Kemisolagabriel
top_posts.title: Kemi Gabriel, MBA, PMP®'s Post - LinkedIn
top_posts.preview: The 8th edition of the program starts on March 24, 2026. ... Digital Security | Global Identity & Access Management | Global Compliance |
top_posts.draft_comment: The accidental PM story is everywhere, and I understand why it feels empowering. But there's a dangerous myth embedded in it - that formal training doesn't matter. In high-stakes programs like hospital networks or government rollouts, I've seen that belief cost millions. Is 'accidental PM' a badge of honor, or have we been romanticizing a skills gap?

top_posts.author: Mohammed Salman 3741A9B4
top_posts.title: Mohammed Salman's Post - LinkedIn
top_posts.preview: I'll be in Dubai until March 24th, 2026, along with my co-founder Mohmed AbuBacker Samsudeen We're looking to meet: • Interior design firms
top_posts.draft_comment: Dubai is full of people seeking meetings. What makes a coffee worth taking is a specific problem, not a general 'let's explore synergies' ask. After two decades in GCC tech leadership, the meetings that created real value had one thing in common - the asker came with a draft of a solution, not a blank page. What specific problem are you trying to solve with these conversations?
